# Acme Agent Tools

> TypeScript SDK, MCP server, and Next.js dashboard for building agent-consumable services. Implements MCP 2025-11-25, A2A v1.0 RC agent discovery, and RFC 9457 error handling.

## Getting started

- [Installation guide](https://example.com/docs/getting-started) — Quick setup with npm/pnpm.
- [SDK quickstart](https://example.com/docs/sdk-intro) — Build your first agent in 5 minutes.
- [Architecture overview](https://example.com/docs/architecture) — System design, component interaction.

## SDK reference

- [Agent API](https://example.com/docs/sdk/agent) — `Agent` class, tool registration, lifecycle.
- [Tool design guide](https://example.com/docs/sdk/tools) — Schemas, namespacing, error handling.
- [Examples](https://example.com/docs/sdk/examples) — Copy-pasteable code samples.

## MCP server

- [Server guide](https://example.com/docs/mcp-server) — Deploy MCP 2025-11-25 servers with typed tools.
- [Tool implementation](https://example.com/docs/mcp-tools) — Register tools, handle tool calls, streaming.
- [OAuth 2.0 integration](https://example.com/docs/mcp-oauth) — M2M client credentials for remote agents.

## API reference

- [REST endpoints](https://example.com/docs/api/endpoints) — Agent queries, tool calls, streaming responses.
- [Schema validation](https://example.com/docs/api/schemas) — Request/response shapes, Zod validators.
- [Error handling](https://example.com/docs/api/errors) — RFC 9457 `Problem+JSON` responses.

## Discovery

- [AGENTS.md](https://example.com/AGENTS.md) — Project conventions, commands, boundaries.
- [robots.txt (AI)](https://example.com/robots-ai.txt) — Crawler policy for AI training bots.
- [Agent card (A2A)](https://example.com/.well-known/agent.json) — Advertise as A2A v1.0 RC agent.

## Advanced

- [Content negotiation](https://example.com/docs/content-negotiation) — Serve markdown to `Accept: text/markdown`.
- [JSON-LD schemas](https://example.com/docs/json-ld) — `SoftwareApplication`, `WebAPI`, `FAQPage`.
- [NLWeb integration](https://example.com/docs/nlweb) — `/ask` endpoint for natural language queries.

## Support

- [GitHub issues](https://github.com/acme/agent-tools/issues) — Bug reports and feature requests.
- [Discussions](https://github.com/acme/agent-tools/discussions) — Q&A and community guidance.
